title: Ninja takes indefinite streaming break, blames Arc Raiders hackers
summary_full: Popular streamer Ninja has announced an indefinite break from streaming, citing extreme frustration with rampant cheating and stream sniping in Arc Raiders.  He described the game as 'literally unplayable' due to hackers exploiting his stream to gain an unfair advantage.  Despite developer promises, the persistent issue is driving away dedicated players and threatening the game's future.
